content:
Wife, alleged lover arrested for husband’s m*rder in Maharashtra, police suspect planned killing

A 28 year old man from Maharashtra's Sangli district allegedly d*ed after being strangled inside his home, leading to the arrest of his wife and her alleged lover. Police said the post-mortem examination indicated that the death was not natural and pointed towards suspected homicide.
comment: Cases like this also highlight why investigators rely on forensic evidence over initial narratives. Early assumptions can easily derail an otherwise strong prosecution.
